00020 
00024 #include "wrappers.h"
00025 
00026 #include "class.h"
00027 #include "header.h"
00028 
00029 #if JEL_POINTER_REVERSAL
00030 
00035 void header_create_gc_counter(header_t *header)
00036 {
00037     class_t *cl = header_get_class(header);
00038 
00039     *header = (header_get_class(header)->id << 16)
00040               | (1 << HEADER_JAVA_OBJECT_SHIFT)
00041               | (1 << HEADER_MARK_SHIFT);
00042 
00043     // Reference arrays have an external counter
00044     if (class_is_array(cl) && cl->elem_type == PT_REFERENCE) {
00045         ((ref_array_t *) header)->count = 0;
00046     }
00047 } // header_create_gc_counter()
00048 
00054 void header_restore(header_t *header, class_t *cl)
00055 {
00056     *header = (uintptr_t) cl | (1 << HEADER_JAVA_OBJECT_SHIFT);
00057 
00058     if (class_is_array(cl) && cl->elem_type == PT_REFERENCE) {
00059         ((ref_array_t *) header)->count = 0;
00060     }
00061 } // header_restore()
00062 
00068 uint32_t header_get_count(const header_t *header, bool array)
00069 {
00070     const header_t mask = (header_t) 0xffff >> HEADER_RESERVED;
00071 
00072     if (array) {
00073         return ((ref_array_t *) header)->count;
00074     } else {
00075         return (*header >> HEADER_RESERVED) & mask;
00076     }
00077 } // header_get_count()
00078 
00084 void header_set_count(header_t *header, uint32_t count, bool array)
00085 {
00086     const header_t mask = ((1 << HEADER_RESERVED) - 1) | 0xffff0000;
00087 
00088     if (array) {
00089         ((ref_array_t *) header)->count = count;
00090     } else {
00091         assert(count < (1 << (16 - HEADER_RESERVED)));
00092         *header = (*header & mask) | (count << HEADER_RESERVED);
00093     }
00094 } // header_set_count()
00095 
00100 uint32_t header_get_class_index(const header_t *header)
00101 {
00102     return *header >> 16;
00103 } // header_get_class_index()
00104 
00105 #endif // JEL_POINTER_REVERSAL
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:38:45 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
